query:
SELECT r.id, r.title, r.status, r.totalPrizes, r.totalValue, r.participantCount,
       COUNT(p.id) AS prizeCount
FROM rollRooms r
LEFT JOIN rollRoomPrizes p ON p.rollRoomId = r.id
GROUP BY r.id, r.title, r.status, r.totalPrizes, r.totalValue, r.participantCount
ORDER BY r.id ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2d1S7viP934C9u9.root --database f39rghmcCDkVuc3rBX8cym --execute SELECT r.id, r.title, r.status, r.totalPrizes, r.totalValue, r.participantCount,
       COUNT(p.id) AS prizeCount
FROM rollRooms r
LEFT JOIN rollRoomPrizes p ON p.rollRoomId = r.id
GROUP BY r.id, r.title, r.status, r.totalPrizes, r.totalValue, r.participantCount
ORDER BY r.id ASC;
